node.title: Universal request envelope
node.summary: Add one consistent outer trace envelope around every MCP request type so each request records receive, parse, route, context acquisition, handler execution, response encoding, and response write phases.

plan.title: Trace and eliminate rare MCP slow-call outliers by adding universal request-path observability, attributing shared bottlenecks, and fixing the blocking behaviors those traces expose.
plan.goal: Trace and eliminate rare MCP slow-call outliers by adding universal request-path observability, attributing shared bottlenecks, and fixing the blocking behaviors those traces expose.

node.title: Shared bottleneck coverage
node.summary: Instrument the shared subsystems that any MCP request may touch, including workspace refresh, revision sync, runtime or session acquisition, worker round-trips, store or database I/O, serialization, and major lock waits.

plan.title: Trace and eliminate rare MCP slow-call outliers by adding universal request-path observability, attributing shared bottlenecks, and fixing the blocking behaviors those traces expose.
plan.goal: Trace and eliminate rare MCP slow-call outliers by adding universal request-path observability, attributing shared bottlenecks, and fixing the blocking behaviors those traces expose.

node.title: Lock and queue observability
node.summary: Split waiting from work across all major locks and queueing boundaries so contention, queue delay, and actual execution time are distinguishable in the durable MCP traces.

plan.title: Trace and eliminate rare MCP slow-call outliers by adding universal request-path observability, attributing shared bottlenecks, and fixing the blocking behaviors those traces expose.
plan.goal: Trace and eliminate rare MCP slow-call outliers by adding universal request-path observability, attributing shared bottlenecks, and fixing the blocking behaviors those traces expose.

node.title: Automatic slow-call capture
node.summary: Emit structured runtime-state snapshots or equivalent metadata automatically when requests cross a slow-call threshold so rare outliers can be diagnosed from the durable log alone.

plan.title: Trace and eliminate rare MCP slow-call outliers by adding universal request-path observability, attributing shared bottlenecks, and fixing the blocking behaviors those traces expose.

node.title: Coverage closure
node.summary: Audit the durable MCP log for remaining opaque slow calls and instrument only the coarse buckets that still hide recurring latency behind generic phases.
